# Albanian MySpell/Hunspell dictionary

This directory vendors the preferred source used to generate FJALË's accepted
guess list.

- Work: Albanian MySpell dictionary
- Version: 1.6.4 (15 July 2011)
- Author: Luan Kelmendi
- Distributor: LibreOffice Dictionaries
- License: GPL-2.0-or-later; see `../../LICENSE`
- `sq_AL.dic` SHA-256: `8fba63fcf7320910803739cc2f0475224a7e8f38f696963d0968e6122a7c0343`
- `sq_AL.aff` SHA-256: `d20b6a23431d28fe6d4e6327eedf846dbed1c3ffbb9574fdcfed4ec308422010`
  (vendored 2026-07-18 from LibreOffice/dictionaries commit `07fd3137`, the same
  commit whose `sq_AL.dic` matches the pin above)

FJALË's transformation is implemented in
`../../scripts/build-accepted-words.mjs` and documented in
`../../THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md`.
